title: Mamba state-space model paper
goal: Find the Mamba state-space model paper and report its key contribution in one sentence.
rubric: Reports the Mamba paper (Gu & Dao 2023) and its selective SSM contribution.
final_answer: Gu, A. and Dao, T. (2023). 'Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces.' arXiv:2312.00752. Introduces selective state-space models that match or exceed Transformers on language modeling while scaling linearly in sequence length.
